scripts.dev: concurrently --names "client,server,processing" --prefix-colors "cyan,green,magenta" "pnpm --filter client dev" "pnpm --filter server dev" "cd processing && .\\venv\\Scripts\\uvicorn main:app --reload --port 8000"
scripts.install:all: pnpm install && cd processing && .\venv\Scripts\pip install -r requirements.txt
